## Description

A clear description of the feature or enhancement.

## Use Case

Why this feature is needed. What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution

How you think this should work. Include UI mockups or API examples if relevant.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Reference

If the original LocationSpoofer macOS app has this feature, describe how it works there.
